form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Most recently second last in a small field at this track in the G1 Citi Hong Kong Gold Cup on March 1 over 2000m, 7 len behind Romantic Warrior carrying 57kg at $7.80. Before that 3rd of 9 at this track in the G1 Stewards' Cup on January 25 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Romantic Warrior with 57kg at $3.90. Not sure how well he's going since the mile in December, but this is a race well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Most recently favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.3 len at this track March 8 over 1200m defeating Sky Trust with 61kg at $2. The race before that 3rd of 7 at this track in the G1 Centenary Sprint Cup on January 25 over 1200m, 3 len behind Ka Ying Rising carrying 57kg at $65. Creates plenty of interest with Purton on board and out to the mile now.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation failed to finish at this track in the G3 Sa Sa Ladies' Purse November 9 over 1800m. Hard to have after his issues last time out.
